with open('expo/.env') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()
env = {}
for line in lines:
    line = line.strip()
    if '=' in line and not line.startswith('#'):
        key, val = line.split('=', 1)
        env[key] = val

match = re.search(r'rnd_[a-zA-Z0-9]+', env.get('RENDER_API_KEY', ''))
render_key = match.group(0) if match else ''

def render_req(path):
    req = urllib.request.Request(f'https://api.render.com/v1{path}')
    req.add_header('Authorization', f'Bearer {render_key}')
    req.add_header('Accept', 'application/json')
    try:
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req)
        return resp.status, resp.read().decode()
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        return e.code, e.read().decode()

# Raw services
status, body = render_req('/services?limit=20')
print("=== RAW SERVICES ===")
print(body[:2000])

# Also try owner endpoint
status, body = render_req('/owners')
print("\n=== OWNER ===")
print(body[:1000])
PYEOF
